steps.title: Spot the negative outcome
steps.content: The UN's goal is to prevent sites from being “willfully damaged” AND from being “left to ______.” The first outcome is clearly negative, so the blank must also represent something negative the UN wants to prevent.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Deteriorate (meaning to decline or worsen) expresses the negative outcome the UN's preservation efforts aim to prevent.

The other choices either express positive change (regenerate), unrelated variation (diversify), or don't fit idiomatically (provoke).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
